---
title: "Course Calendar"
# format: html
format: pdf
# format: docx
execute:
  echo: false
  warning: false
  message: false
title-block-banner: false
prefer-html: true
# date: 09/15/2024
date-modified: last-modified
---

# Course Calendar

```{r}

library(kableExtra)
library(gt)
library(tidyverse)

calendar <- read_csv("./schedule.csv") %>%
  mutate(WEEK=paste(Week1,WEEK,sep=" ")) %>%
  select(-block,-Week1) %>%
  mutate(DATE=paste(Day,Month,sep="-")) %>%
  # mutate(SESSION=as.character(SESSION)) %>%
  select(WEEK,
         DATE,
         TOPIC, 
         READING=Reading,
         `ASSIGNMENT`=`ASSIGNMENT DISTRIBUTED or DUE`) %>%
  # select(WEEK,SESSION,DATE,TOPIC, `ASSIGNMENT`=`ASSIGNMENT DISTRIBUTED or DUE`) %>%
  replace_na(list(DATE="",WEEK="", TOPIC="", `ASSIGNMENT`="", READING="")) %>%
  mutate(WEEK = gsub("NA NA","", WEEK)) %>%
  mutate(WEEK = gsub("Finals Wk NA","Finals Wk", WEEK))




calendar |>
gt() |>
  tab_header(
    title = "Course Topics and Key Dates",
    # subtitle = "===")
  ) |>
  # gt(rowname_col = "WEEK") |>
  tab_row_group(
  label = "WHY ARE WE FASCINATED BY TROPICAL RAIN FORESTS?",
    rows = 2:5,
    id = "why") |>
  tab_row_group(
  label = "THE ECOLOGY & EVOLUTION OF TROPICAL RAIN FORESTS",
    rows = 6:15,
  id = "ecology") |>
  tab_row_group(
  label = "THE DRIVERS AND IMPACTS OF DEFORESTATION",
    rows = 16:21,
  id = "drivers") |>
  tab_row_group(
  label = "THE FUTURE OF TROPICAL RAIN FORESTS",
    rows = 22:31,
  id = "future") |>
    row_group_order(groups = c(NA,"why","ecology","drivers","future"))|>
   tab_style(
    style = cell_fill(color = "darkgreen"),
    locations = cells_row_groups(groups = c("why","ecology","drivers","future"))
  )|>
  tab_style(
    style = cell_text(color = "white", weight = "bold"),
    locations = cells_row_groups(groups = c("why","ecology","drivers","future"))
  )|>
  tab_style(
    style = cell_text(align = "center"),
    locations = cells_row_groups(groups = c("why","ecology","drivers","future"))
  )|>
    tab_style(
    style = cell_fill(color = "darkgreen"),
    locations = cells_column_labels(columns = c("WEEK","DATE","TOPIC","ASSIGNMENT","READING"))
    )|> 
  tab_style(
    style = cell_text(color = "white", weight = "bold"),
    locations = cells_column_labels(columns = c("WEEK","DATE","TOPIC","ASSIGNMENT","READING"))
  )|>
   cols_width(
    # num ~ px(150),
    # ends_with("r") ~ px(100),
    # starts_with("date") ~ px(200),
    WEEK ~ "12%",
    DATE ~ "10%",
    TOPIC ~ "48%",
    READING ~ "10%",
    `ASSIGNMENT` ~ "23%"
   )|>
  tab_style(
    style = cell_text(weight = "bold"),
    locations = cells_column_labels(columns = everything())
  ) |>
  cols_align(
  align = c("center"),
  columns = c("WEEK","READING")
)|>
  tab_options(latex.use_longtable = TRUE, latex.tbl.pos = "h")
```
